Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Rachel's in labor and about to give birth at any minute with only Cyd to support her because Tony is literally out on a ledge trying to stop a troubled, older cop, who is a friend, from jumping.
Video.title: A Time To Be Born

Video.summary: When one of Eastbridge's most powerful socialities, is murdered, it is discovered she has been running a call girl service and one name on her list of clients is Commissioner Scali!
Video.title: The Rolodex Madam

Video.summary: Hunter goes to Australia to help solve a murder involving a former girlfriend who's been missing for 3 years.
Video.title: Down And Under

Video.summary: As Halloween approaches, a heart is cut from the body of a corpse at a funeral home and concerned Eastbridge parents pressure Tony to protect their children from the suspect, an eccentric recluse.
Video.title: The Witches Of Eastbridge

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall must work individually after they are separated as partners by their new precinct leader.
Video.title: Change Partners And Dance

Video.summary: Tony, distraught when it appears that Phil Reid, one of his best men, may be targeted for revenge by a dangerous escaped convict.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: The search for a vengeful woman suspected of murdering two men involved in her sister's cocaine-related death.
Video.title: True Confessions

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall attempt to break a cocaine syndicate apparently being run by one of Hunter's ex-partners.
Video.title: The Castro Connection

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate mysterious calls to a reporter about a series of murders.
Video.title: Saturday Night Special

Video.summary: Tony is torn when a series of life-threatening incidents occur in Eastbridge and the only link appears to be Ed Mize, an old, mild-mannered friend currently experiencing marital difficulties.
Video.title: The Two Faces Of Ed

Video.summary: Tony's son David is shocked when his friend Jason shoots Brad Harris, the school bully. What follows is a crisis of conscience.
Video.title: Guns & Sons

Video.summary: Tony's former partner seeks revenge for a long jail sentence.
Video.title: Revenge

Video.summary: Hunter and Dee get a murder case reopened in order to exonerate a paroled ex-boxer and find the real killer.
Video.title: The Return Of Typhoon Thompson

Video.summary: McCall masquerades as a nightclub singer to investigate the disappearance of a rock music star.
Video.title: The Cradle Will Rock

Video.summary: Hunter receives a death threat from a quick-tempered foreign official determined to avenge his brother's death
Video.title: High Noon In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall's kidnapping-homicide investigation is thwarted by a rich industrialist.
Video.title: The Contract

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall try to protect their informant, Sporty James, after he blackmails a ruthless cocaine dealer.
Video.title: Love, Hate And Sporty James

Video.summary: The malicious leader of paramilitary neo-Nazis take Hunter and McCall captive while planning their next attack
Video.title: Bad Company

Video.summary: While investigating a homicide, McCall falls in love with the prime suspect - the victim's husband.
Video.title: Crime Of Passion

Video.summary: Hunter attempts to apprehend a vicious robbery suspect while he clashes with a vindictive reporter.
Video.title: Overnight Sensation

Video.summary: When crooked Circuit Prosecutor Eli Starke hires some local thugs to thwart the efforts of a group of ex-convicts trying to go straight, Reno comes to their rescue.
Video.title: Moody River

Video.summary: Reno's old friend, D.A. Harry Wells, recruits him to help find his daughter Dawn, who is being held hostage by her drug-dealing boyfriend.
Video.title: Vanished

Video.summary: A ghost from Reno's past appears and convinces him that his older brother Mitch, who went MIA over Cambodia 17 years ago and whom the government declared dead, is still alive.
Video.title: Fighting Cage, Part 1

Video.summary: Reno's only means of saving himself and his brother is to break the psychological hold that Bracket's lies have over Mitch by reminding him of their past.
Video.title: Fighting Cage, Part 2

Video.summary: By returning home to honor the one-year anniversary of his fiancee's death, Reno puts himself precariously close to Lt. Dixon's deadly clutches.
Video.title: The Hound
